bird.name: 灰树鹊
bird.summary: 灰树鹊（学名：Dendrocitta formosae），又名树鹊，俗稱山八哥，鸦科树鹊属，是亞洲的一種樹鵲，屬於中型且尾巴較長的鴉科鳥類。此物種由羅伯特·斯文豪於1863年首次描述。牠們廣泛分布於喜馬拉雅山脈山麓地區，橫跨印度次大陸，並延伸至中南半島、中國南部及台灣。不同地區…

relations.subject: 灰树鹊
relations.evidence: In China, there are an estimated 10,000 to 100,000 breeding pairs, and the population size in Taiwan is estimated at 10,000 to 100,000 breeding pairs. The population in Hainan may be endangered by habitat destruction. The species has a large range, and the population decline does not appear to be very rapid, so the IUCN Red List has assessed the species to be of least concern
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
